name: Pecan Butter Cookies
recipeIngredient: 3/4 cup Butter or margarine, at room temperature
recipeInstructions:
1. In a mixing bowl, cream the brown sugar and butter until smooth.
2. Blend in the milk, vanilla extract, and egg.
3. Stir together the flour, baking soda, and salt.
4. Add the dry ingredients to the creamed mixture; blend until a smooth dough forms.
5. Add the pecans.
6. Spoon rounded spoonfuls of dough onto lightly greased cookie sheets.
7. Bake at 375°F for 10-12 minutes or until lightly golden.
8. Remove from cookie sheets immediately and cool on racks.
VARIATIONS:
Chocolate-Pecan Butter Cookies: Add 1 cup chocolate chips to the dough along with the pecans.
Coconut Butter Cookies: Substitute 2 cups flaked coconut for the pecans.
